states.name: Clarice
states.title: Black Summer Rose
states.description:
"Kuhuhu. How do I look, Miss? It suits me? My, how wonderful to hear."
"Since we have the chance, would you do me the honor of playing with me? You would!? Then please, assist me in making a boat. Once we have, we can row to a deserted island, then send the boat out into the sea. Then it will be just you, me, and our love, forever."

states.name: Clarice
states.title: Black Summer Rose
states.description:
"Miss! Would you care for a drink?"
"Ah, this other one? Mm. You, over there. If you must stare so enviously, then here, have it before the ice melts."
(How rude of you, to intrude upon my private time with my Mistress. For all you know, someone might have put something in that. Fortunately for you, that isn't the case... this time. Kuhuhu...)

states.name: Clarice
states.title: Black Summer Rose
states.description: Between a bright blue sky and soft white sand, the maid and her mistress play together. Separated by a desperate sin, reunited by a chance twist of fate. Only time will tell if further tragedy lies in their future, but for now, the two laugh and smile together, as the surf laps the sand.
